name: Proof-of-Trust BTC Agent
description: Rust AI trading agent for BTC/USD via Kraken CLI. Hexagonal architecture with momentum + Claude/ADK hybrid strategy, EIP-712 signed intents, on-chain risk enforcement, and full validation artifact trail. Designed for verifiable trust — AI proposes, contracts enforce.

services.name: trading-dashboard
services.description: Live trade log with decision artifacts, risk gate outcomes, and performance metrics

services.name: metrics
services.description: Real-time counters: ticks, trades executed, trades blocked, holds, errors

services.name: decision-schema
services.description: JSON Schema for the Decision type (Buy/Sell/Hold with confidence and reasoning)
